title: Skeleton Infection
body:
![skeleton infecting a pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7748497abfff7acb973f42f4d28cd7ff99a84c8_0.webp)

Mod Description



Let the Bone War Begin!

Skeleton Plague is a simple but chaotic Minecraft mod that turns the overworld into a bone-filled battlefield! With this mod, skeletons no longer care who they’re shooting at! They’ll attack any and every mob in sight, friend or foe.



Features:
- Skeletons now attack all mobs
- Once a mob dies by a skeleton it turns into another skeleton
